title: AUGSUN 110pcs 1/4inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes…
features: stainless steel
【QUALITY MATERIAL】: Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women.
【PACKAGE INCLUDES】: Package includes 110 pieces spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.
【SIZE】: 6.35 mm (1/4 inch) in length, tapered and needle-shaped, which increases friction between the sole and the ground and prevents skidding.

【EASY TO USE & REPLACE SPIKES】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【PROVIDE GREAT DRIP FOR SPORTSMAN】: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints, long jump, running.

reviews.title: Cheap price, cheap product
reviews.text:
Lots of the spikes I received were malformed. They were too round to fit the wrench key that came with them so I couldn't screw them in. At least one of them is stuck and I am unsure if I will be able to remove it.

I would suggest going with something else.

title: ASICS Gel-Quantum 360 Knit 2 Men's Running Shoe
description: Run hard, land soft. The GEL-QUANTUM 360 KNIT 2 shoe is constructed with 360 degrees of our GEL Brand technology cushioning that blends high performance with maximum comfort. A new stretch knit upper surrounds the foot in a custom, sock-like fit so you can power through running and cross-training workouts.Weight: 12.6. Heel Height: 22. Forefoot Height: 12.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System - Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Heel Clutching System Technology - Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
FluidFit Upper - ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.

Ortholite Lasting - This lasting material features plush underfoot comfort while providing excellent moisture management and a high level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of ATP Manufacturing LLC.)

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner - This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of ATP Manufacturing LLC.)

title: ASICS Men's Dynablast Running Shoes
description: The DYNABLAST shoe is recommended for runners who want a responsive underfoot experience during their run. This running shoe comfortably wraps around the foot like a gentle hug. This design features a lightweight and breathable upper to keep feet cool without forgoing support. Additionally, the shoe's upper is made with recycled materials, while the sockliner is produced with a solution dyeing process that reduces carbon emissions and water usage. Equipped with FLYTEFOAM Blast cushioning in the midsole to generate soft landings, this material is also complemented with underfoot cutouts in the outsole to provide runners with a more responsive toe-off.

reviews.title: Dyna and Nova both a Blast.
reviews.text: I had put 700 miles on my Novablast this year and wanted to tell you they held up great even through many runs in snow and rain. I found the Nova well cushioned,nice tongue, wide toe box, firm mid,, but  unstable on camber and turns and a touch heavy.. The dyna I recently purchased feel lighter, good heel cushion, thinner tongue and nice toe drop. I really like both models of ASIC.  Perfect for me at 36 miles a week.

title: Brooks Women’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely lightweight and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

title: ASICS Jolt Men's Running Shoe
description: Mens ASICS Jolt :: Durable, lightweight, synthetic overlays, neutral cushioning.
features: Rubber sole

reviews.title: Affordable and comfortable
reviews.text:
Update: I decided to keep these. Ok, so I am ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee, I tried them for everyday but couldn't get over what I'll call the "dad sneakers" look. But I took these for a run and wow! They're very comfortable. A little clunky but flexible enough for daily training and the cushion is just right for me, sightly on the plush side but not squishy. These are my new daily runners. I don't know how long they'll last, but for the price, if I get 200 miles, I'll be happy.

Also, if you're a 3e/4e and you like or need a wide toe box, these will deliver. I'm a smaller 4e but i need a wide toe box, especially since I'm not willing to give up my injinji toe socks. These are very spacious with plenty of room for my toe splay.

-----

Original review: From the product pictures I wasn't sure if I'd like them or hate them. But for the price I figured I might as well try them. They fit nicely, have moderate cushion, and they're more flexible than I expected. They're basic sneakers, no bells or whistles. But they're comfortable enough I would try running in them. They're certainly not fashion forward, but I wouldn't be ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee. And if you're looking for extra-wide these fit like a true 4e. I expected to hate them but I'm pleasantly surprised and I'll probably keep them and use they for everyday sneakers or runners.

reviews.title: Waited a year of use before my review
reviews.text: To be honest I only bought these shoes from the way they looked (Camo) and only after watching a few viedeos on them.. the price is great.. the comfort is surprising and easy to wear. I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

Lastly, the outsole is also more durable, incorporating a traction pattern that's been improved with re-engineered lugs under the heel. All of these updates make the new GEL-VENTURE 8 MT shoe an excellent companion for your next adventure.

reviews.title: Not sure if my feet grew... :)
reviews.text: I'm 55 and normally wear a 11.5 regular so that's what I ordered. My toes were super scrunched up and hitting the tip of the shoe, so I had to return them and order a half size up. They seem narrow in the front to me. Aside from that IMO they look better in the pics than in person but for the price I'm not going to complain too much. Seems like a solid shoe otherwise. The inserts seem to be glued in which is a bummer because I use orthotic inserts especially in my running shoes.

reviews.title: Who'd,thunk....these could be so comfortable
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics for several years now and have been pleased. They do not last very long but they are comfortable and at about $50 per pair (always buy on sale) it is much cheaper then other name brands. I thought I would try the mid tops as I used to wear hightops in my early years. I am glad I did, they are very comfortable. So good that I just ordered a second pair (grey) as soon as I tried these coffee (brown) ones on. The grey ones are on sale for just $40 so its a no-brainer.

reviews.title: High top Asics
reviews.text: I've worn Asics for ever and was actually skeptical about buying since other reviewers that where Asics gave poor reviews. Well, in glad I bought them. I have always wanted Asics to make a high top and they finally did. These will make great trail shoes. I'm returning a pair of Merrells that didn't fit like old Merrells did. The Asics have built in stability for people with high arches. They are lightweight,  comfortable and fit like good shoes should. Asics didn't drop the bar as others complained, looks like the same high quality at reasonable prices they are known for.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Excellent running shoes. The fit is more on the tight side, but it definitely fits. I give it 4/5 stars because it's not quite as comfortable as the Adidas Duramo line which also has adiprene. However I have yet to run a lot in these so it may be better than Duramo in the long term, or for more intense running. Duramo's have extra padding that, while very comfortable, feels like it could eventually start to chafe. These have a more snug fit with no such padding, but are still very comfortable.

reviews.title: Cut Foot
reviews.text: At first glance these shoes looked ideal. The uppers are mesh and they tie. The black and white look sporty. But the shoes left a,cut on the top of my left foot. The piece that holds the lace is not padded and it rubbed and cut the top of the foot. The right one was okay. Just not acceptable. I suppose yoi could afgix pads to prevent the rubbing or better yet buy shoes without that problem.

reviews.title: Great for walking and running, on even or paved surfaces.
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:c1b550fb45bc70f6146cd85777443b05]] The M MGRNDL sneakers are light, a bit flexible, and the air cushion design provides a cushioned impact. They have a good grip on surfaces, so they provide stability.

They do look good and the upper mesh fabric has some breathable properties.

They do a good job when walking and running short distances.
I would have liked if they mold to the foot better and had softer fabric, but at this price point it might be hard to find.

The M MGRNDL might not provide a good experience when running on uneven surfaces. They are not as comfortable as other well known and higher priced (twice as much) running sneakers brands.
The air cushion do provide a bit of support and comfort when running on even ground, such as concrete, pavement, grass or sand.
They do provide some level of impact resistant and support on the feet.

title: Saucony Women's Switchback 2 Trail Running Shoe
description: Dialed to grip and rip trails fast. For trail runners looking to get to their destination fast, The lightweight Switchback 2 is a race-ready machine that delivers more of what you need—long-distance cushioning placed into a nimble, grippy, and dialed-in package.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Love the idea, needs some redesign
reviews.text: I really want to like this shoe more. I do actually use them a lot but it took nearly half a year to really break them in, and they’re still fairly difficult to slip into, as the opening is not very flexible. The shoe itself is tight enough where the laces don’t even really need to be there, and the toe box is fairly narrow which isn’t very good for running and hiking. My pinky toe often feels wedged by this one part of the design and frequently causes pain. I really REALLY like the idea of this shoe though and it’s still wearable for moderate hikes under 2 hours, I just wish they put more work and testing. It’s probably better for people with thinner, narrower feet. My feet are medium wide and the top part is kind of high.

reviews.title: Fits just right
reviews.text: I like the way the shoes fit; however, they are more attractive in the picture than on my feet, at least to me.  They are a little pricey too, but all in all, I would recommend them.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 7 Running Shoes
description: Take on the toughest terrain in confidence with the men's GEL-VENTURE 7 performance trail running shoe by ASICS. Featuring GEL technology and an EVA midsole, this shoe is made for athletes who love to run in the great outdoors. GEL technology in the rearfoot area of the shoe provides shock absorption where you need it most, while the ORTHOLITE sockliner provides an additional layer of cushioning underfoot. It even molds to the shape of your feet, making each run even more comfortable than the last. Extra support comes from the sturdy upper crafted from synthetic leather, while the internal heel counter gently helps your foot remain in its natural line of motion, making for a more efficient stride. Meanwhile the EVA midsole protects your feet against impact and increases rebound, giving you an energetic feeling as you clock up the miles. Durable and practical, the GEL-VENTURE 7 shoe makes an excellent training partner whether you're new to trail running or a seasoned pro.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Imported
Ethylene Vinyl Acetate sole

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.)
Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.

reviews.title: Great for disc golf
reviews.text: Image is my second attempt at patching a massive toe hole. Probably should just buy a new pair... These lasted through 4 months of pretty intense disc golf. All told, probably 350 miles of running on trails, through creeks and mud, etc. Not to mention repeated torsion on the fabric in a way it wasn't designed for. Through it all, these have dried quickly and remained comfortable. Not bad for $50, would buy again.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 22 Running Shoes
description: The Gel-Cumulus 22 running shoe is the recommended choice for neutral runners who want a soft and flexible daily trainer with a great fit. This update features a one-piece superior mesh combined with a seamless 3D printing structure that balances support and comfort around the foot, giving you an excellent fit right away. Flytefoam midsole is softer than the previous version for comfortable riding. Under the heel where the foot hits for the first time the ground has been redesigned to better insulate the impact. This new heel design has deeper grooves on the forefoot and a softer midsole foam to give you a soft drive. A durable AHAR rubber sole has been placed in key contact areas to help the Gel-Cumulus 22 shoe withstand a ton of miles.

reviews.title: Comfortable, sturdy and a great value.
reviews.text:
First things First. I received this as a review item in exchange for an unbiased review. I have an 11 M foot (US) and while I wasn't overly crazy about the color, I realized they matched a lot of my race wear. So I decided to give them a try. The first run was a little tough but that's always the case (If you're new to running, trust me, don't run your first race without adequately breaking in your shoes). After about 15 miles I started to really like them.

So, you see the colors. I personally always buy the clip on laces which I did butI've probably got well over 60 miles on them now and while I'm pretty loyal to another brand (which is also costs substantially more) I will definitely be picking up another pair.

If you are a heel striker (work on your form before you suffer the consequences of it) these have ample cusioning in the back - but take a friendly word of advice, instead of getting into bad form. These are great shoes to improve your form with and once you have it, the extra padding in the back is not impediment. They are very light and fit well once worn in. I'm not trilled about the simultaneously yet cool look they have but so is life. You don't buy running shoes to look cool unless you're a poster you buy them for performance and these deliver.

Again I'm speaking to new runners and people that aren't that familiar with the sport. You don't want to have one pair you wear every day. They'll develop a wear pattern and it's not good. Instead buy at least two, ideally a few and alternate so that this happens at a much slower pace. From my experience, three pairs of shoes worn on alternating days will last much longer than one pair bought three times. And this is important b/c unless you're working on bearfoot running (which seems to still be a raging philosophical battle in the podiatric communities) you'll want support, comfort and stability. As a digression, I've tried barefoot running and it fundamentally changed the way I ran, until I stepped on a piece of glass and my right foot had yet to harden.

Again at the risk of lecturing remember that injuries are one of the biggest enemies to progress. You could easily run through broken glass on these and probably right over some smaller nails (I'm not advising it, just pointing it out). Styling aside I love these and will be picking up another pair or two in the near future.

title: Skechers Men's Max Cushioning Premier Vantage-Performance Walking & Running Shoe Sneaker
description: Add more cushioned comfort and response to your run with the Skechers Max Cushioning Premier™. A cushioned comfort running and walking design on an ULTRA GO® cushioned platform. The company's success stems from it's high quality, diversified, and affordable product line that meets consumers' Various lifestyle needs. Since it's inception in 1992, the Skechers diverse product offering has grown from utility style boots to include seven Skechers brands and five uniquely branded fashion lines for men and women. Skechers is an award-winning global leader in lifestyle footwear offering shoes that appeal to trend-savvy men, women and kids everywhere. The brand's styles include the latest innovative athletic, casual and fashion sneakers as well as sandals and boots—with many collections featuring Skechers air-cooled memory foam insoles for added comfort. Plus, Skechers offers a range of slip-resistant work FOOTWEAR for men and women, as well as cool, fun, playful and lighted styles that boys and girls love. Always ahead of the fashion curve, Skechers has made its sport, casual and dress casual shoes essential to every closet.

Don't but these shoes as they will wear out in just a few months.

title: EZ-STIK 13.1 Half Marathon Decal Sticker 6" 5k 10k Running Shoes runnerA010
description: There is no background color. The surface that you apply the sticker to will become your background color. This will be a single color sticker. This is a DIE-CUT vinyl decal meaning that the background has been trimmed off. If there is a background color in the picture, it is used only as a representation. The background color will be the surface color you place the sticker on (or clear if you put it on a window). The decal will come with clear transfer tape, so you can easily apply it to anything you like (walls, windows, cars, mailbox, mirrors, laptops, etc etc etc). I use PREMIUM Oracal brand vinyl for all decals. Application is relatively easy. Your decal will come as THREE pieces - the backing paper, the sticker itself, and the clear transfer tape. Make sure you are applying to a CLEAN surface. You carefully pull the clear transfer tape up from the backing paper, making sure that it pulls the sticker up with it (if it does not, then firmly press down on it with a squee-gee or credit card or something similar until it sticks properly to the clear transfer tape). Then you apply the sticker and clear transfer tape to whatever surface you would like the decal on. You then use a squee-gee or credit card or something similar to firmly press down once again, making sure that the sticker STICKS, and then you carefully and slowly remove the clear transfer tape from the top, leaving behind only the sticker. I have found that on some surfaces (especially walls and wood surfaces), it helps to leave the clear transfer tape on for awhile to make sure everything is sticking well before removing it. I do not issue refunds or exchanges on vinyl decals. Please understand this before you bid. Some decals are more difficult to apply than others (especially the little ones!) - likewise, some surfaces are more difficult to apply decals to.

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text: I was excited to receive these. I also have a pair that stick in the hole on the shoes. I prefer these, however, because you can adjust where the beam is directed by moving the heel strap around. I use my crocs for taking care of the chickens. So this is great for the walk to the coop every night.

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.text: Great little product gives good light and I can pop them on my tennis shoes for camping.

reviews.title: Fun little headlights for your shoes
reviews.text: I've had these lights on my shoes full time for the last few days, and I really like them for evening walks.  They don't replace a flashlight, but they do light up a fair amount of the path that I wouldn't otherwise see with my small flashlight.  I've smacked them against car doors and chair rails a few times, and they've stayed solidly on my feet and are no worse for wear.  They are great for visibility for others too - your feet move a lot, and so do these lights.  Add flashing and you're much more visible either walking or on a bicycle.  I think they'd also be great for camping, and maybe at a dance party (flashing feet might be fun!)  My only thought is that they seem a little pricey, but they are one of the few that go on shoe laces and not just popping into holes in Crocs.  They're quite sturdy and battery life is great too.

reviews.title: Perfect for early morning/night walking
reviews.text: I bought these lights for an upcoming hike to the Grand Canyon in October. We need to start our hike before sunrise and thought these would be the perfect accessory to stop us from tripping in the dark. What I like - they are small and lightweight, with a secure clip for my shoes. The battery is a standard size. They are easy to turn off and on. I'm undecided on if these are really bright enough to be practical... is there a light - yes. Is it going to replace a flashlight - absolutely not. I don't know if I'd buy these again for the purpose of a hike, but they would be good if you are an early morning/late evening walker and runner and want additional lights for safety so cars, etc, can see you.
